metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace. Hosts the `mavitalk` plugin — a bundle of reusable, project-agnostic workflow skills shared across all repos and machines.

plugins.name: mavitalk
plugins.description: Bundle of reusable, project-agnostic Claude Code workflow skills. Currently includes finishing-the-session (end-of-session wrap-up: independent verification + next-session handoff + clean commit). Project-agnostic — each skill reads gates/conventions/language from the project's CLAUDE.md.
